title: The Stalker
description: This mod adds The Stalker to your game
body:
![Stalker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df58b52f867f24d19c7f05ddd53df15f79952999.png)
- This mod adds **The Stalker** to your game!
- The mob "randomly" spawns, and tries to kill you!

- In this mod you can craft a **Stalker Sword!** (Recipe in Gallery)
- You can craft a **Stalker Spawn Egg** for trolling / testing! (Recipe in Gallery)

- Download **now**!
